title: Hyperbel Survival Mods Lite
description: A client side modpack made for the members of our server so that everyone has compatible mods.
body: This is the Lite version of this modpack [Hyperbel Survival Mods](https://modrinth.com/modpack/hyperbel-survival-mods). It is a modpack useful for building redstone machines in the creative and survival sectors. It also has several optimization mods. It mainly contains mods that help us, for example, with Restone constructions and can also cover a lot in the survival area. This mod pack was created by a private survival server. We're making this public because it makes it easier for everyone to update and so others can use it too.
